subject: AdobeDeflate with LZW TIFF
body:
Hi

I've updated Warp to 1.0.7 from 1.0.6 and I'm having trouble running the 
relion test data though the pipeline. It was working on 1.0.6 but now it 
seems there is a problem with AdobeDeflate. 

It works fine on gain corrected and uncorrected MRC stacks and single frame 
MRCs but doesn't seem to be happy with LZW compressed tiffs.

I converted teh tiffs to MRCs to test again and found that it causes Warp 
to crash by killing the WarpWorkers.

Any help would be greatly appreciated
Mike
